_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to develop and recommend analytic approaches or solutions to problems and situations for which information is incomplete or for which no precedent exists.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business question, balancing statistical rigor, time constraints, data availability, and audience comprehension capacity.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.634), AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.633).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.567). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [analytic, approaches, develop, exists, incomplete, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, appropriate, audience, availability, balancing, business] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.859, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to develop and recommend analytic approaches or solutions to problems an" and "Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business questio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.646 > STS 0.567 (gap +0.080). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [analytic, approaches, develop, exists, incomplete, information]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, appropriate, audience, availability, balancing, business].
